overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white cape walking through a futuristic industrial storage facility or spaceship interior. The character passes a security guard and enters a doorway marked 'SECURITY' in a dimly lit, metallic environment with artificial lighting and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage corridor with metal shelving

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the storage area and distant doorway

entered.detail: tall metal storage racks lined with white containers and supplies
pair of yellow traffic cones with reflective stripes placed in the corridor
rectangular overhead light fixtures embedded in the metal ceiling
large circular metal door frame at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward through a narrow industrial corridor lined with metal shelving units on the right side. Yellow safety cones sit in the middle of the metal grating floor, and artificial ceiling lights illuminate the misty air as the character approaches a distant circular doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint area with guard station

events.description: character turns left to approach the security guard standing by the shelves

agents.ego_description: turning toward the left side of the corridor to approach and pass the security guard

notable_agents.action: security guard standing with arms crossed near the shelving units

entered.detail: metal security doorway with reinforced frame at the end of the corridor
illuminated sign reading 'SECURITY' above the doorway
stack of wooden crates on the lower shelf near the guard

segments.scene_description: Turning left toward a security guard standing near shelving units, the character passes by storage crates and approaches a doorway marked with a security sign. The guard stands with arms crossed as the character moves toward the threshold.

scene_state.functional_zone: security door transition to inner corridor

events.description: character passes through the security doorway into the next corridor section

agents.ego_description: walking through the security door into the next corridor section

entered.detail: continuation of the metal corridor visible through the doorway
thick reinforced metal door frame surrounding the security entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the security doorway, leaving the storage area behind. The metal door frame and interior corridor beyond come into view as the character enters the next section of the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty industrial storage area that leads into a restricted security zone. It begins by following the character down a narrow corridor lined with metal shelving and yellow safety cones, moving across a grated floor toward a distant circular opening. As the character nears the end of the hall, the camera turns left to pass a security guard standing with crossed arms beside stacks of storage crates. The scene then shifts toward a doorway marked with a security sign, moving closer to the threshold. Finally, the camera glides through the door frame, leaving the storage facility behind to enter a new interior corridor.
